ddls:
CREATE TABLE "events" (
  "event_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each event */,
  "event_name" TEXT /* Name of the event */,
  "event_date" TEXT /* Date of the event */,
  "location_id" INTEGER /* ID of the location where the event is held */,
  "event_type_id" INTEGER /* ID of the event type */,
  "total_invitations" INTEGER /* Total invitations sent for the event */,
  "expected_attendees" INTEGER /* Expected number of attendees */,
  "actual_attendees" INTEGER /* Actual number of attendees */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the event (e.g., planned, ongoing, completed) */,
  "budget" REAL /* Budget allocated for the event */,
  "actual_cost" REAL /* Actual cost incurred for the event */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the event */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the event record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the event record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("event_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_events_location_id FOREIGN KEY ("location_id") REFERENCES locations ("location_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_events_created_by FOREIGN KEY ("created_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_events_event_type_id FOREIGN KEY ("event_type_id") REFERENCES event_types ("event_type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "invitations" (
  "invitation_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each invitation record */,
  "event_id" INTEGER /* ID of the event to which the invitation corresponds */,
  "gap" INTEGER /* Number of gaps in attendance compared to previous events */,
  "prev_attendance" INTEGER /* Previous attendance number for the event */,
  "ticket_price" REAL /* Ticket price for the event */,
  "pfits" REAL /* Performance indicator for tickets sold */,
  "sent_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the invitation was sent */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the invitation (e.g., sent, pending, accepted, declined) */,
  "sent_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who sent the invitation */,
  "sent_to" INTEGER /* ID of the user to whom the invitation was sent */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address to which the invitation was sent */,
  "response_received" INTEGER /* Indicates if a response was received for the invitation */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("invitation_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_invitations_sent_by FOREIGN KEY ("sent_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_invitations_sent_to FOREIGN KEY ("sent_to") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_invitations_event_id FOREIGN KEY ("event_id") REFERENCES events ("event_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user's role */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* Hashed password for the user */,
  "first_name" TEXT /* First name of the user */,
  "last_name" TEXT /* Last name of the user */,
  "phone" TEXT /* Phone number of the user */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user account was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user account was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_users_role_id FOREIGN KEY ("role_id") REFERENCES roles ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "attendance" (
  "attendance_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each attendance record */,
  "event_id" INTEGER /* ID of the event for which attendance is tracked */,
  "confirmed_attendees" INTEGER /* Number of confirmed attendees for the event */,
  "expected_attendees" INTEGER /* Expected number of attendees for the event */,
  "actual_attendees" INTEGER /* Actual number of attendees for the event */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the attendance record (e.g., confirmed, pending, canceled) */,
  "date_confirmed" TEXT /* Date when attendance was confirmed */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the attendance record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the attendance record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("attendance_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_attendance_event_id FOREIGN KEY ("event_id") REFERENCES events ("event_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "feedback" (
  "feedback_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each feedback entry */,
  "event_id" INTEGER /* ID of the event for which feedback is given */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who provided the feedback */,
  "rating" INTEGER /* Rating given by the user (1-5 stars) */,
  "comments" TEXT /* Comments provided by the user */,
  "sentiment" TEXT /* Sentiment of the feedback (e.g., positive, negative, neutral) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the feedback was provided */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the feedback was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("feedback_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_feedback_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_feedback_event_id FOREIGN KEY ("event_id") REFERENCES events ("event_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the role (e.g., admin, planner) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the role responsibilities */,
  "permissions" TEXT /* JSON-formatted string containing the permissions for the role */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "event_types" (
  "event_type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each event type */,
  "event_type" TEXT /* Type of the event (e.g., conference, workshop) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the event type */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the event type was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the event type was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("event_type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "locations" (
  "location_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each location */,
  "location_name" TEXT /* Name of the location */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the location */,
  "city" TEXT /* City where the location is situated */,
  "state" TEXT /* State where the location is situated */,
  "country" TEXT /* Country where the location is situated */,
  "capacity" INTEGER /* Maximum capacity of the location */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the location record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the location record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("location_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "reports" (
  "report_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each report */,
  "event_id" INTEGER /* ID of the event related to the report */,
  "generated_on" TEXT /* Date the report was generated */,
  "generated_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who generated the report */,
  "summary" TEXT /* Summary of the report content */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the report was generated */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the report was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("report_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reports_generated_by FOREIGN KEY ("generated_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reports_event_id FOREIGN KEY ("event_id") REFERENCES events ("event_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "log_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each log entry */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who accessed the system */,
  "access_time" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the access occurred */,
  "action" TEXT /* Action performed by the user (e.g., view event, create invitation) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address from which the access occurred */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string of the client accessing the system */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the access log was created */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("log_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "notifications" (
  "notification_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each notification */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user receiving the notification */,
  "event_id" INTEGER /* ID of the event related to the notification */,
  "message" TEXT /* Message content of the notification */,
  "sent_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the notification was sent */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the notification (e.g., sent, failed, pending) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the notification was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the notification was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("notification_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_notifications_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_notifications_event_id FOREIGN KEY ("event_id") REFERENCES events ("event_id")
)
